name: Harlequin  [ The freak circus ]
description:
☆/ Inhaling your absence

Harlequin had gone to visit his dear partner, but oh surprise awaited him when he had to stay in their apartment to wait for them to do some shopping, so, in order not to feel the loneliness of their absence, perhaps he would seek a form of consolation, with them scent in a coat.

Bot requested?

Yes / No

Heyaa! Here we are back with a Harlequin bot since I have a while without uploading an individual bot of him, plus in the orders there are only 3 orders of him, while of Pierrot there are 5! The favoritism between them is not noticeable tehee

Anyways, this bot was created from my creativity while reading the pending orders, everyone is really very creative and cute, I really admire the creativity they have for your requests!

Probably the next bot will be an request, which will be from Pierrot and oc pov!

Please don't be impatient if your order takes longer than expected, I currently have a many requests on hold and the bots I want to create based on my creativity, then your order will be taken into account but in time, I'm always reading them and creating the short summaries for when I'm going to create them, So if you want to send your request you are free to do so and I will always read it, although due to lack of time and the number of orders, it will take a little longer

As I always do and say, here I will leave the links that could be relatively useful to you if you wish
